title: Canonical category list — category intelligence (Bins 2–3 AI mapping)
notes: 19 categories. Path: workspace/notebooks/category-research/taxonomy_v1.example.json — use with categorize_category_bins --taxonomy, or copy to taxonomy_v1.json locally. Boundaries: large appliances → Kitchen & dining; computers/TVs/gadgets → Electronics; patio sets → Outdoor & patio furniture; nursery case goods → Furniture; physical books/CDs → Books & media; brand-only manifest labels map by product type, not brand name.
